fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the number of the bank account used on the reconciliation line.
The program fills in the field from the Bank Account No. field on the Bank Account Reconciliation header.

fields.name: Statement No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the number of the bank account statement received from the bank that is used on the reconciliation line.
The program fills in the field from the Statement No. field on the Bank Account Reconciliation header.

fields.name: Statement Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the number of the reconciliation line.
The program inserts this number automatically. This number provides a trail by linking the reconciliation line with the ledger entry line that it has been applied to. The number will be inserted automatically on the applied bank account or check ledger entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number of your choice that will appear on the reconciliation line.

fields.name: Transaction Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the payment represented by the journal line was recorded in the bank account.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the transaction on the reconciliation line.

fields.name: Statement Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transaction on the bank's statement shown on this reconciliation line.

fields.name: Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the amount in the Statement Amount field and the amount in the Applied Amount field.

fields.name: Applied Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that has been applied to one or more open entries.

fields.name: Applied Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies for a journal line where the payment has been applied, how many entries the payment has been applied to.

fields.name: Value Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value date of the transaction on the bank reconciliation line.

fields.name: Ready for Application
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Check No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the check number for the transaction on the reconciliation line.

fields.name: Related-Party Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer or vendor who made the payment that is represented by the journal line.

fields.name: Additional Transaction Info
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional information on the bank statement line for the payment.

fields.name: Data Exch. Entry No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Data Exch. Line No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that the payment application will be posted to when you post the worksheet.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number that the payment application will be posted to when you post the worksheet.

fields.name: Transaction Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies the text that the customer or vendor entered on that payment transaction that is represented by the journal line.

fields.name: Related-Party Bank Acc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account number of the customer or vendor who made the payment.

fields.name: Related-Party Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer or vendor who made the payment that is represented by the journal line.

fields.name: Related-Party City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city name of the customer or vendor.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up on the General Ledger Setup page.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up om the General Ledger Setup page.

fields.name: Match Confidence
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quality of the automatic payment application on the journal line.

fields.name: Transaction ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the imported bank transaction.
